content: I gotta be honest with you guys: don't even bother getting into a relationship. Like whatchu looking for man? No fluff, that shi' just takes away your time and productivity. Stay safe
Been thinking of a whole lotta stuff. With how things are going I'm not far from commuting a couple'0 felonies for the bag 🤣

Suspected, got her friend drunk really drunk and spilled a dirty secret she told me about the friend, the friend opened mouth and told me  A-Z. Funny thing is the friend doesnt even remember she said that much😂

I got into a fight with my roommate and I used her toothbrush to clean the toilet without her consent.
I saw her brushing with it this morning😭😭
